euler-dao.name: Euler DAO
euler-dao.description: Euler DAO is responsible for the governance and development of the Euler protocol and related infrastructure.

gauntlet.name: Gauntlet
gauntlet.description: Gauntlet is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets informed by risk modeling and parameter analysis. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

k3.name: K3 Capital
k3.description: K3 Capital is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

alphaping.name: AlphaPing
alphaping.description: AlphaPing is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults focused on USDT markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

re7-labs.name: Re7 Labs
re7-labs.description: Re7 Labs is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure onchain vaults and lending markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

telosc.name: TelosC
telosc.description: TelosC is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets and incentive-related DeFi strategies. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

edge-capital.name: Edge UltraYield
edge-capital.description: Edge UltraYield is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected DeFi markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

hyperithm.name: Hyperithm
hyperithm.description: Hyperithm is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets involving selected collateral assets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

clearstar.name: Clearstar
clearstar.description: Clearstar is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected decentralized markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.
